mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM outbox_message WHERE publish_status = 'PENDING'
SELECT * FROM outbox_message WHERE publish_status = 'PENDING' AND available_at <= NOW() ORDER BY available_at ASC, message_id ASC LIMIT 50
mapper.update: UPDATE outbox_message SET publish_status = 'SENT', published_at = NOW(), attempt_count = attempt_count + 1, last_modified_at = NOW() WHERE message_id = #{messageId}

UPDATE outbox_message SET publish_status = 'FAILED', last_error = #{lastError}, attempt_count = attempt_count + 1, available_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '5 minutes', last_modified_at = NOW() WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
mapper.select: WITH claimed AS ( SELECT message_id FROM outbox_message WHERE publish_status = 'PENDING' AND available_at <= NOW() ORDER BY available_at ASC, message_id ASC LIMIT 50 FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED ) UPDATE outbox_message SET publish_status = 'PUBLISHING', last_modified_at = NOW() WHERE message_id IN (SELECT message_id FROM claimed) RETURNING *
mapper.update: UPDATE outbox_message SET publish_status = 'PENDING', last_modified_at = NOW() WHERE publish_status = 'PUBLISHING' AND last_modified_at < #{cutoff}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbox_message ( message_id, payment_instruction_id, event_type, event_schema_version, payload, publish_status, attempt_count, available_at, last_error, published_at, first_registrant_id, last_modifier_id ) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{paymentInstructionId}, #{eventType}, #{eventSchemaVersion}, #{payload}::jsonb, #{publishStatus}, #{attemptCount}, #{availableAt}, #{lastError}, #{publishedAt}, #{firstRegistrantId}, #{lastModifierId} )
